name: Lisas Mushroom Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the batter by blending all ingredients except the mushrooms, salt, and lemon juice until smooth.
2. Clean the mushrooms using a mushroom brush or a moistened paper towel. Avoid washing them in water to prevent excess moisture.
3. Sprinkle the cleaned mushrooms with a little lemon juice and salt.
4. Heat oil to 360°F (182°C).
5. Dip each mushroom into the batter and carefully drop it into the hot oil.
6. Cook until golden brown, then transfer cooked mushrooms to a paper towel-lined sheet in a low oven.
7. Serve with fresh ranch dip. Zucchini slices can also be prepared this way and served with ranch dip.
